prompt: Edit image 1: Overlay the central 'Welcome to Program Options Dialog!' popup window from image 2 onto the main interface of image 1, simulating a dialog box appearing on the software.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Overlay the 'Welcome to Program Options Dialog!' popup window, including its title bar and borders, from image 2 onto the center of the 'Bulk Rename Utility' interface in image 1. The dialog should appear as a newly opened window, centered both horizontally and vertically over the existing application.
objects: "Welcome to Program Options Dialog!" popup window
"Welcome to Program Options Dialog!" text within the popup
